title: AN ACT EXPANDING AND UPGRADING THE LAKEWOOD MUNICIPAL HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LAKEWOOD, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL SUR, FROM A TEN-BED CAPACITY MUNICIPAL HOSPITAL INTO A TWENTY-FIVE-BED CAPACITY DISTRICT HOSPITAL, TO BE KNOWN AS THE LAKEWOOD DISTRICT HOSPITAL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 16205 / 88 OG No. 24, 3725 (June 15, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7437, April 23, 1992 ]

AN ACT EXPANDING AND UPGRADING THE LAKEWOOD MUNICIPAL HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LAKEWOOD, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL SUR, FROM A TEN-BED CAPACITY MUNICIPAL HOSPITAL INTO A TWENTY-FIVE-BED CAPACITY DISTRICT HOSPITAL, TO BE KNOWN AS THE LAKEWOOD DISTRICT HOSPITAL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Lakewood Municipal Hospital in the Municipality of Lakewood, Province of Zamboanga del Sur, is hereby expanded and upgraded from a ten-bed capacity municipal hospital into a twenty-five bed capacity district hospital, to be known as the Lakewood District Hospital.

SEC. 2. The amount necessary to carry out the provisions of this Act shall be included in the General Appropriations Act of the year following its enactment into law and thereafter.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.)

RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on May 16, 1991 and February 3, 1992, respectively.

(Sgd.)

ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.)

CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: APRIL 23, 1992

(Sgd.)

CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
